title: Create Amplified (Forge)
description: A mod pack that amplifies Create adding addons and mods that add backpacks, new equipment, and less performance than the fabric version.
body: This mod pack is based on the Create mod and includes performance mods. The mod pack also includes backpacks, new structures, and even Enderite! This mod pack has Create Addons that add certain things to the Create mod like jetpacks and Cars. This Forge version has different additions than the Fabric version. The main things will still be there though.
